name: Sheen

passives.name: Spellblade
passives.effects: After using an [[Champion ability|ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|100% '''base''' AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

effects_structured.raw: After using an ability, your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals bonus physical damage equal to 100% base AD (1.5s cooldown after use).

simpleDescription: Grants a bonus to next attack after spell cast

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: after ability cast, Sheen arms a Spellblade window for 10 seconds and the next qualifying basic attack consumes it for bonus physical damage equal to 100% base attack damage.
Timing model: Spellblade cooldown starts after the empowered attack is consumed, and consecutive ability casts refresh the armed window.
Player-visible behavior: Spellblade can be consumed on structures, but jungle plants do not consume or trigger the empowered hit.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Sheen
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Spellblade timing, window refresh behavior, and trigger exclusions for structures versus jungle plants
